[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

1 000101011 4
2 010111110 6
3 010111111 7
4 110010010 4
5 001101011 5
6 110111101 7
7 101011111 7
